input.background: The odds ratio for the case-control data in Table 18.15 is $\widehat{O R}=\frac{96 \cdot 666}{104 \cdot 109}=5.64$.
input.question: Calculate the odds ratio for the case-control data given in Table 18.15.

output.method: 分类或发生概率影响因素解读
output.answer: The odds ratio is calculated as $\widehat{O R}=\frac{96 \cdot 666}{104 \cdot 109}=5.64$.

Alcohol_grams_per_day.description: The amount of alcohol consumed per day, categorized into two groups: ≥ 80 grams/day and < 80 grams/day.

Cases.description: The number of cases of esophageal cancer for each alcohol consumption category.

Noncases.description: The number of non-cases (controls) of esophageal cancer for each alcohol consumption category.
